params.negative_prompt: no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no digits, no labels, no stickers, no decals, no placards, no serial tags, no serial plates, no engraved plates, no warning signs, no warning plates, no stamped markings, no screen digits, no icon plates, no symbol plates, no interface readouts, no readable ui, no crowd scene, no multiple readable faces, no room-wide crowd context, no hearing-room spectacle, no isolated monument object, no disaster montage
params.note_text: Final v3 beat 05 deliverable. Preserve the calm systems thesis and the absorbed warning signal.
params.accent_palette: pale gray, desaturated green, charcoal, warning amber
params.safe_zone_intent: keep the systems field and one absorbed warning trace above the subtitle band and leave the top UI band nearly empty
params.signal_anchor: institutional system calmly absorbing the damage signal it should have treated as abnormal
params.historical_anchor: not one bad call but a system that normalized damage until small causes carried massive consequences
params.surreal_breach: the warning signal becomes smaller as it spreads, disappearing into routine while its consequences feel physically disproportionate

prompt_fragments.anchor_fragment: institutional monitoring field and damage signal compressed into one calm thesis frame
support_fragments: console repetition and one breach-memory accent kept subordinate to the systems read
the warning trace dissolving into background process rather than standing apart from it
directives: make the systems thesis immediate without collapsing into a cover monolith
prefer calm institutional logic over spectacle or hearing-room melodrama
keep the absorbed warning legible at thumbnail size
